Itemized  ·  Procedures  ·  Carotid duplex ultrasound  ·  California

Carotid duplex ultrasound cost in California.

Cash-pay range for carotid duplex ultrasound across 49 hospitals in California: $15 to $4,318. CPT code 93880. Pulled from each hospital's federally-mandated price transparency file.

Cheapest in California
$15
Adventist Health Glendale
Glendale, CA
vs.
Most expensive in California
$4,318
Garfield Medical Center
Monterey Park, CA
